sentences.sentence: The cutting of huge figures or 'geoglyphs' into the earth of English hillsides has taken place for more than 3,000 years.
sentences.translation: 在英格兰山坡的地面上刻出巨型图案，也就是所谓的“地画”，这种做法已有三千多年的历史。

structure.text: The cutting of huge figures or 'geoglyphs' into the earth of English hillsides
into the earth of English hillsides

difficult_points: 句子主语是以 cutting 为核心的动名词短语，而不是 huge figures。
take place 表示“发生、进行”，现在完成时强调这一做法从过去延续至今。
or 'geoglyphs' 是对 huge figures 的补充说明。

sentences.sentence: There are 56 hill figures scattered around England, with the vast majority on the chalk downlands of the country's southern counties.
sentences.translation: 英格兰各地散布着56处山坡图案，其中绝大多数位于该国南部各郡的白垩丘陵地带。

structure.text: with the vast majority on the chalk downlands of the country's southern counties
on the chalk downlands of the country's southern counties

difficult_points: There are 是存在句结构，真正的信息中心是 56 hill figures。
scattered around England 是过去分词短语，修饰 hill figures，表示它们“散布于”各地。
with 后接“名词＋地点成分”，补充说明这些图案的主要分布区域。

sentences.sentence: The figures include giants, horses, crosses and regimental badges.
sentences.translation: 这些图案包括巨人、马、十字架和军团徽章。

structure.text: giants, horses, crosses and regimental badges

difficult_points: include 后面直接列举图案的四种类型。
regimental badges 指代表军团身份的徽章图案。

sentences.sentence: Although the majority of these geoglyphs date within the last 300 years or so, there are one or two that are much older.
sentences.translation: 虽然这些地画大多可以追溯到近三百年左右，但其中有一两处要古老得多。

structure.text: Although the majority of these geoglyphs date within the last 300 years or so
date within the last 300 years or so

difficult_points: Although 引导让步状语从句，与后面的“有一两处更古老”形成转折。
date 在这里是动词，表示“始于某一时期、可追溯到”。
that 指代 one or two，即一两处地画。

sentences.sentence: The most famous of these figures is perhaps also the most mysterious – the Uffington White Horse in Oxfordshire.
sentences.translation: 这些图案中最著名的或许也是最神秘的——位于牛津郡的阿芬顿白马。

structure.text: The most famous of these figures
the Uffington White Horse in Oxfordshire

difficult_points: the most famous 后省略了 figure，完整含义是“最著名的那个图案”。
破折号后的名称具体说明前面的“最著名也最神秘的图案”是什么。

sentences.sentence: The White Horse has recently been re-dated and shown to be even older than its previously assigned ancient pre-Roman Iron Age* date.
sentences.translation: 最近，人们重新测定了白马的年代，并证实它甚至比此前认定的古代前罗马铁器时代还要早。

structure.text: has recently been re-dated and shown
than its previously assigned ancient pre-Roman Iron Age* date

difficult_points: has been re-dated and shown 是现在完成时的被动结构，共用助动词 has been。
shown to be 表示“被证实是”，不定式说明证实的结果。
previously assigned 修饰 date，指此前被认定的年代。

sentences.sentence: More controversial is the date of the enigmatic Long Man of Wilmington in Sussex.
sentences.translation: 更具争议的是位于苏塞克斯郡、身份成谜的威尔明顿长人的年代。

structure.text: the date of the enigmatic Long Man of Wilmington in Sussex

difficult_points: 句子把表语 More controversial 提到句首，主语实际是后面的 the date。
enigmatic 表示其来历或含义难以解释，而不是简单的“神秘外观”。

sentences.sentence: While many historians are convinced the figure is prehistoric, others believe that it was the work of an artistic monk from a nearby priory and was created between the 11th and 15th centuries.
sentences.translation: 许多历史学家确信这一图案源自史前时期，而另一些人则认为，它是一位来自附近修道院、颇具艺术才华的修士所作，创作于11至15世纪之间。

structure.text: While many historians are convinced the figure is prehistoric
that it was the work of an artistic monk from a nearby priory
and was created between the 11th and 15th centuries

difficult_points: While 在这里表示“然而、而”，连接两种相对立的观点。
are convinced 后省略了 that，其后的句子是确信的内容。
and was created 与 it was the work 并列，共用主语 it。

sentences.sentence: The method of cutting these huge figures was simply to remove the overlying grass to reveal the gleaming white chalk below.
sentences.translation: 刻制这些巨型图案的方法很简单：移除覆盖在上面的草皮，露出下方闪亮的白色白垩层。

structure.text: The method of cutting these huge figures
to reveal the gleaming white chalk below

difficult_points: 主干是 The method was to remove...，不定式说明具体方法。
第二个不定式 to reveal 表示移除草皮所要达到的目的。
overlying 和 gleaming 都是现在分词形式的形容词，分别修饰 grass 和 chalk。

sentences.sentence: However, the grass would soon grow over the geoglyph again unless it was regularly cleaned or scoured by a fairly large team of people.
sentences.translation: 然而，除非由一支人数不少的队伍定期清理或刮除草皮，否则草很快又会覆盖地画。

structure.text: the grass would soon grow over the geoglyph again
unless it was regularly cleaned or scoured by a fairly large team of people

difficult_points: unless 相当于 if...not，表示不定期清理就会出现的结果。
it 指代 geoglyph，而 cleaned or scoured 是并列的被动动作。
grow over 表示草生长并逐渐覆盖某物。

expressions.meaning_zh: 一支人数相当多的……队伍

sentences.sentence: One reason that the vast majority of hill figures have disappeared is that when the traditions associated with the figures faded, people no longer bothered or remembered to clear away the grass to expose the chalk outline.
sentences.translation: 绝大多数山坡图案已经消失，原因之一是：当与这些图案相关的传统逐渐淡去时，人们便不再费心或记得清除草地，让白垩轮廓显露出来。

structure.text: One reason that the vast majority of hill figures have disappeared
that the vast majority of hill figures have disappeared
that when the traditions associated with the figures faded, people no longer bothered or remembered to clear away the grass to expose the chalk outline
when the traditions associated with the figures faded
people no longer bothered or remembered to clear away the grass

difficult_points: 第一个 that 说明“哪一种原因”，第二个 that 引出原因的具体内容。
when 从句嵌套在表语从句中，交代人们停止维护图案的时间背景。
associated with... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 traditions。

sentences.sentence: Furthermore, over hundreds of years the outlines would sometimes change due to people not always cutting in exactly the same place, thus creating a different shape to the original geoglyph.
sentences.translation: 此外，数百年间，由于人们并非每次都在完全相同的位置切割，轮廓有时会发生变化，从而形成与原始地画不同的形状。

structure.text: due to people not always cutting in exactly the same place
people not always cutting in exactly the same place
thus creating a different shape to the original geoglyph

difficult_points: due to 后接动名词复合结构 people not always cutting...，说明轮廓变化的原因。
thus creating... 是结果性的现在分词短语，表示前述变化造成的后果。
would sometimes change 描述漫长历史中反复出现的情况。

sentences.sentence: The fact that any ancient hill figures survive at all in England today is testament to the strength and continuity of local customs and beliefs which, in one case at least, must stretch back over millennia.
sentences.translation: 如今英格兰竟然还有古老的山坡图案留存下来，这一事实本身便证明了当地习俗与信仰的强大生命力和延续性；至少有一处的传统必定已绵延数千年。

structure.text: The fact that any ancient hill figures survive at all in England today
that any ancient hill figures survive at all in England today
testament to the strength and continuity of local customs and beliefs
which, in one case at least, must stretch back over millennia

difficult_points: that 从句与 fact 构成同位内容，说明“事实”具体是什么。
at all 用在这里加强语气，突出古老图案能够留存本身就很难得。
which 指向 local customs and beliefs，说明它们至少有一例延续了数千年。

sentences.sentence: The Uffington White Horse is a unique, stylised representation of a horse consisting of a long, sleek back, thin disjointed legs, a streaming tail, and a bird-like beaked head.
sentences.translation: 阿芬顿白马是一种独特且高度风格化的马形图案，由修长流畅的背部、纤细而不相连的腿、飘动的尾巴以及鸟喙般的头部组成。

structure.text: a unique, stylised representation of a horse
consisting of a long, sleek back, thin disjointed legs, a streaming tail, and a bird-like beaked head

difficult_points: representation 在这里指对马的艺术化表现或造型，而非普通的“代表”。
consisting of... 是现在分词短语，修饰 representation，列出图案的构成部分。
disjointed legs 指图案中的腿部线条彼此不连接。

sentences.sentence: The elegant creature almost melts into the landscape.
sentences.translation: 这匹优雅的白马仿佛与周围景观融为一体。
difficult_points: creature 在语境中指前文的阿芬顿白马图案。
melts into 是形象表达，表示其线条与自然环境几乎融为一体。

sentences.sentence: The horse is situated 2.5 km from Uffington village on a steep slope close to the Late Bronze Age* (c. 7th century BCE) hillfort of Uffington Castle and below the Ridgeway, a long-distance Neolithic** track.
sentences.translation: 白马位于距阿芬顿村2.5公里的一处陡坡上，靠近青铜时代晚期（约公元前7世纪）的阿芬顿城堡山堡，也处在里奇韦古道下方；里奇韦是一条新石器时代的长途道路。

structure.text: close to the Late Bronze Age* (c. 7th century BCE) hillfort of Uffington Castle

difficult_points: is situated 后连续接距离和多个地点成分，共同说明白马的具体位置。
and 连接 close to... 与 below... 两个并列的位置成分。
逗号后的 a long-distance... 是 Ridgeway 的同位说明。

sentences.sentence: The Uffington Horse is also surrounded by Bronze Age burial mounds.
sentences.translation: 阿芬顿白马周围还分布着青铜时代的墓冢。
difficult_points: is surrounded by 是被动结构，表示墓冢分布在白马四周。
burial mounds 指覆盖墓葬的土丘，即墓冢。

sentences.sentence: It is not far from the Bronze Age cemetery of Lambourn Seven Barrows, which consists of more than 30 well-preserved burial mounds.
sentences.translation: 它离兰伯恩七冢的青铜时代墓地不远，那里由30多座保存完好的墓冢组成。

structure.text: the Bronze Age cemetery of Lambourn Seven Barrows
which consists of more than 30 well-preserved burial mounds

difficult_points: It 指代上一句的 The Uffington Horse。
which 指代 cemetery，并补充说明该墓地的构成。
well-preserved 是复合形容词，表示“保存完好的”。

sentences.sentence: The carving has been placed in such a way as to make it extremely difficult to see from close quarters, and like many geoglyphs is best appreciated from the air.
sentences.translation: 这处地画的位置使人很难从近处看清；和许多地画一样，从空中观赏它效果最佳。

structure.text: has been placed in such a way
as to make it extremely difficult to see from close quarters
and like many geoglyphs is best appreciated from the air

difficult_points: such a way as to... 表示“以这样一种方式，以至于……”，说明选址造成的结果。
make it difficult to see 中 it 是形式宾语，真正内容是后面的不定式。
and 后省略主语 The carving，is best appreciated 表示“最佳观赏方式是”。

expressions.text: in such a way as to

sentences.sentence: Nevertheless, there are certain areas of the Vale of the White Horse, the valley containing and named after the enigmatic creature, from which an adequate impression may be gained.
sentences.translation: 不过，在白马谷的某些地方，人们仍能较为完整地看到这幅图案；白马谷正是包含这匹神秘白马并以它命名的山谷。

structure.text: there are certain areas of the Vale of the White Horse
the valley containing and named after the enigmatic creature
containing and named after the enigmatic creature
from which an adequate impression may be gained

difficult_points: the valley... 是 Vale of the White Horse 的同位语，补充解释这一地名。
containing 与 named after 并列，但前者为主动含义，后者为被动含义。
from which 中 which 指 certain areas，表示从这些地点可以获得整体印象。

sentences.sentence: Indeed on a clear day the carving can be seen from up to 30 km away.
sentences.translation: 事实上，在天气晴朗时，远在30公里之外都能看到这处地画。
difficult_points: can be seen 是情态动词加被动语态，强调地画的可见性。
up to 表示最大距离可达30公里，并非固定在30公里处。

sentences.sentence: The earliest evidence of a horse at Uffington is from the 1070s CE when 'White Horse Hill' is mentioned in documents from the nearby Abbey of Abingdon, and the first reference to the horse itself is soon after, in 1190 CE.
sentences.translation: 关于阿芬顿白马的最早证据来自公元11世纪70年代，当时附近阿宾登修道院的文献中提到了“白马山”；而直接提及白马本身的最早记录则紧随其后，出现在公元1190年。

structure.text: The earliest evidence of a horse at Uffington is from the 1070s CE
when 'White Horse Hill' is mentioned in documents from the nearby Abbey of Abingdon
and the first reference to the horse itself is soon after

difficult_points: when 引导定时关系，具体说明 1070s CE 时发生了什么。
and 连接两个完整主句，分别给出对白马山和白马本身的最早记载。
itself 用于强调文献后来直接提到了“白马本身”。

sentences.sentence: However, the carving is believed to date back much further than that.
sentences.translation: 然而，人们认为这处地画的历史要比这些记载早得多。

structure.text: to date back much further than that

difficult_points: is believed to... 是客观表达观点的被动结构，避免指出具体判断者。
that 指前文公元11至12世纪的文献记录时间，而非某件实物。

expressions.meaning_zh: 可追溯到早得多的时期

sentences.sentence: Due to the similarity of the Uffington White Horse to the stylised depictions of horses on 1st century BCE coins, it had been thought that the creature must also date to that period.
sentences.translation: 由于阿芬顿白马与公元前1世纪硬币上风格化的马形图案十分相似，人们过去一直认为这匹白马也必定属于那个时期。

structure.text: Due to the similarity of the Uffington White Horse to the stylised depictions of horses on 1st century BCE coins
that the creature must also date to that period

difficult_points: the similarity of A to B 表示 A 与 B 的相似性。
主句中的 it 是形式主语，真正被认为的内容是后面的 that 从句。
had been thought 用过去完成时被动语态，说明这是后来重新测年前的旧观点。

expressions.text: the similarity of A to B
expressions.meaning_zh: A 与 B 的相似性

sentences.sentence: However, in 1995 Optically Stimulated Luminescence (OSL) testing was carried out by the Oxford Archaeological Unit on soil from two of the lower layers of the horse's body, and from another cut near the base.
sentences.translation: 然而，1995年，牛津考古部门对取自白马身体下部两个土层以及底部附近另一处切口的土壤进行了光释光（OSL）检测。

structure.text: on soil from two of the lower layers of the horse's body, and from another cut near the base

difficult_points: was carried out 是被动结构，检测的执行者由 by 引出。
on soil 表示检测所针对的样本，后面两个 from 短语并列说明土壤来源。
cut 在考古语境中指为了取样或观察土层而挖出的切口。

sentences.sentence: The result was a date for the horse's construction somewhere between 1400 and 600 BCE – in other words, it had a Late Bronze Age or Early Iron Age origin.
sentences.translation: 检测结果将白马的建造年代确定在公元前1400年至公元前600年之间——换言之，它起源于青铜时代晚期或铁器时代早期。

structure.text: a date for the horse's construction somewhere between 1400 and 600 BCE
it had a Late Bronze Age or Early Iron Age origin

difficult_points: a date 在这里不是某个具体日期，而是测得的年代范围。
破折号后的内容用更熟悉的历史时期重述前面的年份范围。
it 指代 the horse，即这处白马地画。

expressions.meaning_zh: 大约在 A 与 B 之间
起源于某一时期或地方

sentences.sentence: The latter end of this date range would tie the carving of the horse in with occupation of the nearby Uffington hillfort, indicating that it may represent a tribal emblem marking the land of the inhabitants of the hillfort.
sentences.translation: 如果取这一年代范围的后段，白马地画的刻制时间便会与附近阿芬顿山堡有人居住的时期吻合，这表明它可能是一种部落标志，用来标示山堡居民的领地。

structure.text: The latter end of this date range
would tie the carving of the horse in with occupation of the nearby Uffington hillfort
indicating that it may represent a tribal emblem marking the land of the inhabitants of the hillfort
that it may represent a tribal emblem
marking the land of the inhabitants of the hillfort

difficult_points: the latter end 指公元前1400至600年这一范围中较晚的部分。
tie A in with B 表示把 A 与 B 联系起来或认为二者时间相符。
indicating... 说明前述吻合可能支持的推论，其中 marking... 又修饰 tribal emblem。

expressions.meaning_zh: 把 A 与 B 联系起来

sentences.sentence: Alternatively, the carving may have been carried out during a Bronze or Iron Age ritual.
sentences.translation: 另一种可能是，这处地画是在青铜时代或铁器时代的一场仪式中刻制的。

structure.text: during a Bronze or Iron Age ritual

difficult_points: Alternatively 引出与“部落领地标志”不同的另一种解释。
may have been carried out 是“情态动词＋完成式被动”，表示对过去行为的推测。

sentences.sentence: Some researchers see the horse as representing the Celtic*** horse goddess Epona, who was worshipped as a protector of horses, and for her associations with fertility.
sentences.translation: 一些研究者认为这匹白马代表凯尔特马神埃波娜；人们将她奉为马匹的保护神，也因她与生育力的联系而崇拜她。

structure.text: see the horse as representing the Celtic*** horse goddess Epona
representing the Celtic*** horse goddess Epona
who was worshipped as a protector of horses, and for her associations with fertility

difficult_points: see A as doing 表示“把 A 看作是在……、认为 A 代表……”。
who 指 Epona，后面的被动结构说明她受到崇拜的身份和原因。
as a protector 与 for her associations 分别表示“以何种身份”和“因何原因”受崇拜。

expressions.meaning_zh: 认为 A 代表 B

sentences.sentence: However, the cult of Epona was not imported from Gaul (France) until around the first century CE.
sentences.translation: 然而，对埃波娜的崇拜直到大约公元1世纪才从高卢（法国）传入。

structure.text: until around the first century CE

difficult_points: not...until... 表示“直到……才……”，重点在传入时间很晚。
cult 在这里指对某位神祇的宗教崇拜，而非现代语境中的一般组织。

sentences.sentence: This date is at least six centuries after the Uffington Horse was probably carved.
sentences.translation: 这一时间至少比阿芬顿白马可能被刻制的年代晚了六个世纪。

structure.text: the Uffington Horse was probably carved

difficult_points: This date 指上一句提到的约公元1世纪。
after 后接完整从句，用白马可能被刻制的时间作为比较基准。
probably 修饰被动谓语 was carved，表明年代仍是推测。

sentences.sentence: Nevertheless, the horse had great ritual and economic significance during the Bronze and Iron Ages, as attested by its depictions on jewellery and other metal objects.
sentences.translation: 尽管如此，这匹马在青铜时代和铁器时代具有重要的仪式与经济意义，珠宝及其他金属器物上的马形图案便证明了这一点。

structure.text: had great ritual and economic significance
during the Bronze and Iron Ages
as attested by its depictions on jewellery and other metal objects

difficult_points: Nevertheless 表明即使埃波娜崇拜传入较晚，马本身在更早时期仍很重要。
as attested by... 是省略结构，相当于 as this is attested by...，引出证据。
its 指 horse，而 depictions 指马在器物上的图像。

sentences.sentence: It is possible that the carving represents a goddess in native mythology, such as Rhiannon, described in later Welsh mythology as a beautiful woman dressed in gold and riding a white horse.
sentences.translation: 这处地画也可能代表本土神话中的一位女神，例如里安农；在后来的威尔士神话中，她被描述为一位身着金色服装、骑着白马的美丽女子。

structure.text: that the carving represents a goddess in native mythology
described in later Welsh mythology as a beautiful woman
dressed in gold and riding a white horse

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正的推测内容由 that 从句表达。
described... 是过去分词短语，逻辑上修饰 Rhiannon。
dressed in gold 与 riding a white horse 并列修饰 a beautiful woman。

sentences.sentence: The fact that geoglyphs can disappear easily, along with their associated rituals and meaning, indicates that they were never intended to be anything more than temporary gestures.
sentences.translation: 地画及其相关仪式和含义很容易一同消失，这一事实表明，它们从来就不是为了成为永久事物，而只是短暂的象征性表达。

structure.text: The fact that geoglyphs can disappear easily, along with their associated rituals and meaning
along with their associated rituals and meaning
that they were never intended to be anything more than temporary gestures
to be anything more than temporary gestures

difficult_points: 第一个 that 说明 fact 的内容，第二个 that 引出 indicates 的宾语。
along with... 补充说明随地画一起消失的仪式和含义，不是句子的主语。
not...anything more than... 表示“不过是、仅仅是”。

sentences.sentence: But this does not lessen their importance.
sentences.translation: 但这并不会削弱它们的重要性。
difficult_points: this 指上一句所说的地画具有临时性且容易消失。
lessen 是及物动词，表示降低或削弱某事物。

sentences.sentence: These giant carvings are a fascinating glimpse into the minds of their creators and how they viewed the landscape in which they lived.
sentences.translation: 这些巨型地画让我们得以一窥其创作者的思想，以及他们如何看待自己生活的那片土地，这一点令人着迷。

structure.text: a fascinating glimpse into the minds of their creators
and how they viewed the landscape

difficult_points: a glimpse into... 表示对某个深层事物的短暂了解或一窥。
how they viewed... 是名词性从句，与 the minds of their creators 共同构成 glimpse 所涉及的内容。
in which they lived 修饰 landscape，相当于 where they lived。

expressions.meaning_zh: 看待周围的土地或景观
